calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

Notice And Motion To Compel Pltf To 1. Answer Form Interrogatories,Set One. 2. Answer Special Interrogatories Set One 3. Answer Request For Production Set One. 4. Produce Document In Response To Request For Production Set One 5. Sanctions For Failure To Comply; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
Defendant Veronica R. Viray's Motion to compel plaintiff to: (1) answer form interrogatories; (2) answer special interrogatories; (3) answer request for production; (4) produce documents in response to request for production; (5) sanctions for failure to comply granted:
1. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified response to defendant's first set of form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and requests for production within ten days of notice of entry of this order;
3. Contemporaneously with the subject responses, plaintiff shall produce all documents identified as responsive to defendant's first set of requests for production;
4. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
